hypothesis: If a single score-based diffusion model trained solely on metastable-state trajectories is sampled using classifier-free guidance with interpolated conditional scores and the outputs are refined by Score-Aligned Ascent along the reaction coordinate r_SAA = s^B - s^A, then ASTRA will generate accurate transition-state configurations (as judged by committor distributions and successful transition rates) without any transition-state training data and will outperform linear and geodesic interpolation baselines on 2D potentials, alanine dipeptide, chignolin, and a chemical reaction.
